name: geeky-orchestration
description: Plan, execute, and track feature implementation end-to-end. Bundles the geeky-plan, geeky-implement, and geeky-status skills (each fronted by a same-named slash command) plus spec-research, plan-review, impl-review, and archive lifecycle skills, a portable geeky-coder agent, a canonical task template, framework-agnostic quality gates (planning-folder, task-schema, kanban-integrity, definition-of-done, and commit-message validators in paired Python/PowerShell), a PreToolUse guard for frozen planning artifacts, an AGENTS.md + manifest discovery layer, and a geeky_mcp server exposing the gates as MCP tools.
